title: Claude Sonnet 5 Is Not Frontier But Has Its Uses
summary: Claude Sonnet 5 Is Not Frontier But Has Its Uses
whyItMatters: Fable 5 is back today, baby ! Premium subscribers have one week to use it within their subscriptions. First hit’s free. Then you pay by the token. Today’s post is still about Sonnet 5.
